'''vafunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ympe|ympe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ympe|ympe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vafunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væfinith|væfinith]] || [[word:væfinij|væfinij]] || [[word:væfinish|væfinish]] || [[word:væfini|væfini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vafufunuth|vafufunuth]] || [[word:vafufunuj|vafufunuj]] || [[word:vafufunush|vafufunush]] || [[word:vafufunu|vafufunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vafunuth|vafunuth]] || [[word:vafunuj|vafunuj]] || [[word:vafunush|vafunush]] || [[word:vafunu|vafunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vafufnuth|vafufnuth]] || [[word:vafufnuj|vafufnuj]] || [[word:vafufnush|vafufnush]] || [[word:vafufnuf|vafufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vafunuthu|vafunuthu]] || [[word:vafunuju|vafunuju]] || [[word:vafunushu|vafunushu]] || [[word:vafunuku|vafunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vafunuth|vafunuth]] || [[word:vafunuj|vafunuj]] || [[word:vafunush|vafunush]] || [[word:vafunu|vafunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vafunuthul|vafunuthul]] || [[word:vafunujul|vafunujul]] || [[word:vafunushul|vafunushul]] || [[word:vafunukul|vafunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vafunuthuthu|vafunuthuthu]] || [[word:vafunujuju|vafunujuju]] || [[word:vafunushushu|vafunushushu]] || [[word:vafunuku|vafunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vafunuthun|vafunuthun]] || [[word:vafunujun|vafunujun]] || [[word:vafunushun|vafunushun]] || [[word:vafunukun|vafunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vafunuthuoro|vafunuthuoro]] || [[word:vafunujuoro|vafunujuoro]] || [[word:vafunushuoro|vafunushuoro]] || [[word:vafunukuoro|vafunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
